'''Neechak''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] gunrunner who worked for [[Tern Ashandrik]]. He stayed at the [[Callamvor Hotel]] when on [[Seregar]]. He was killed in his room there.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
